provider.title: AI Model
provider.subtitle: Choose your AI provider to get started
provider.footer: You can add more models later in Settings.

summarizer.title: Summarizer model
summarizer.subtitle: A fast model for web page summarization. Can be the same as your main model or a cheaper/faster one.

tools.title: Web search & fetch
tools.subtitle: Let the agent search the web and read pages. Optional — you can configure these later.

compute.title: Compute environments
compute.subtitle: ClawWork uses sandboxed environments to run code safely.
compute.vmDesc: Local Linux VM for cowork sessions. You can skip this and set it up later in Settings.
compute.vmDepsHint: System dependencies install in the background — you can continue using ClawWork while it runs.
compute.vmSkipped: Skipped — you can set this up later in Settings
compute.skipConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to skip?
compute.skipConfirmVm: Without a Virtual Machine, Cowork mode will not be available.
compute.skipConfirmDeps: VM System Dependencies are not installed. Cowork mode will work but the agent may lack some tools. You can install them later in Settings (runs in the background).
compute.skipConfirmNote: You can configure these later in Settings.
compute.depsPromptDesc1: Installing VM system dependencies is strongly recommended. It gives the agent access to tools like Python, Node.js, LaTeX, LibreOffice, and more.
compute.depsPromptDesc2: The installation runs in the background — you can start using ClawWork immediately.

done.title: You’re all set!
done.subtitle: Here’s what you configured:
done.footer: You can change any of these later in Settings.

errors.configureModelFirst: Please go back and configure your AI model first
